race.comment: LINEBACKER (2) has the class edge in this field. Last appeared when a tiring sixth in the Doncaster six weeks ago. Beaten 1.5 lengths by Joliestar in the Group 1 Canterbury Stakes over this trip in March. That form stands out in a race of this quality. ESTADIO MESTALLA (1) made late ground but was never a threat first-up in the 1100m Hawkesbury Gold Rush at Listed level. One placing in seven second-up runs is a flashing light. Too good to rule out all the same. CAPTAIN FURAI (13) has gone to new heights this prep, capped by a gutsy win in a BM100 last time out at Randwick. Three runs at this distance for three wins is a compelling stat. Can go to this next level now. POINT AND SHOOT (16) missed the kick but still went awfully at Wagga last time. Better than that so worth another chance down in the weights. Last start Tamworth Cup winner FORMAL DISPLAY (9) is unbeaten this prep and deserves his chance in this better company.
